Liu Zhou ŚäČŚÜĎ
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Liu Zhou (ŚäČŚÜĎ). Led revolt against Shu but was defeated by Ma Zhong. Liu Zhou was affiliated with Nanman. Liu Zhou lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
